## 5. Prior Financial Trends
Coverage: 2 quarters | Sources: xbrl=2

### Income Statement Trend
| Metric           | Q2_FY2023 | Q1_FY2023 |
|------------------|-----------|-----------|
| Revenue          | $8.73B    | $8.91B    |
| Cost of Revenue  | $2.62B    | $2.91B    |
| Gross Profit     | $6.12B    | $6.00B    |
| SG&A             | $438M     | $348M     |
| R&D              | $1.31B    | $1.20B    |
| Interest Expense | $405M     | $406M     |
| Income Tax       | $235M     | $66M      |
| Operating Income | $4.01B    | $4.10B    |
| Net Income       | $3.48B    | $3.77B    |
| EPS Diluted      | $8.15     | $8.80     |

### Margins and Efficiency
| Metric             | Q2_FY2023 | Q1_FY2023 |
|--------------------|-----------|-----------|
| Gross Margin %     | 70.0%     | 67.3%     |
| Operating Margin % | 45.9%     | 46.0%     |
| Net Margin %       | 39.9%     | 42.3%     |
| R&D % Revenue      | 15.0%     | 13.4%     |
| Effective Tax Rate | 6.3%      | 1.7%      |
| Diluted Shares     | 427M      | 429M      |

### Cash Flow and Capital
| Metric              | Q2_FY2023 | Q1_FY2023 |
|---------------------|-----------|-----------|
| Operating Cash Flow | $4.50B    | $4.04B    |
| Capex               | $122M     | $103M     |
| Free Cash Flow      | $4.38B    | $3.93B    |
| Buybacks            | $2.81B    | $1.19B    |

### Balance Sheet
| Metric             | Q2_FY2023 | Q1_FY2023 |
|--------------------|-----------|-----------|
| Cash & Equivalents | $11.55B   | $12.65B   |
| Total Assets       | $71.67B   | $72.98B   |
| Long-Term Debt     | $38.19B   | $38.17B   |

### Derivation notes

**Q2_FY2023**:
- operating_cash_flow: derived via h1_ytd_minus_q1, inputs: h1_ytd from 0001730168-23-000064 (10-Q), q1 from 0001730168-23-000008 (10-Q)
- capex: derived via h1_ytd_minus_q1, inputs: h1_ytd from 0001730168-23-000064 (10-Q), q1 from 0001730168-23-000008 (10-Q)
